login.title: Sign in
login.heading: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your watch history, favorites and progress in sync.
login.googleOnly: Google is the only sign-in method.
login.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

hero.tagline: Stream trending, popular and top-rated anime in premium quality.

notFound.title: Anime not found
notFound.description: We couldn't find the anime you're looking for. It may have been removed or the link is incorrect.

search.title: Search
search.heading: Find your next anime
search.subtitle: Search thousands of titles by name or genre.
search.idleHint: Search by title or pick a genre below.
search.noResultsHint: Try a different title or genre.

browse.errorTitle: Something went wrong. Please try again.

popular.title: Popular
popular.heading: Popular anime
popular.subtitle: The most-watched titles right now — scroll to keep exploring.
popular.emptyHint: Popular anime will appear here once the catalog is available.

blogs.title: Blog
blogs.heading: From the blog
blogs.subtitle: News, features and deep dives from the Minna team.
blogs.emptyHint: Check back soon for news and features.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.heading: Your favorites
favorites.subtitle: Every anime you've saved, newest first.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any anime to save it here.
favorites.signedOutTitle: Sign in to see your favorites
favorites.signedOutHint: Your saved anime are tied to your account. Sign in to view and manage them.

profile.title: Profile
profile.heading: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and pick up where you left off.
profile.signedOutTitle: Sign in to view your profile
profile.signedOutHint: Your profile, watch history and favorites are tied to your account.

history.title: Continue watching
history.subtitle: Jump back into your recent episodes.
history.emptyHint: Episodes you watch will show up here.

favorites.title: Your favorites
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any anime to save it here.

player.unavailableTitle: This episode can't be played right now
player.unavailableBody: No streaming source is available. Streaming requires a configured Consumet origin — please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

ads.title: Ads
ads.subtitle: Manage pre-roll ads shown before episodes.
ads.newSubtitle: Add a pre-roll ad and set its skip and duration timing.
ads.editSubtitle: Update this ad's details and timing.
ads.empty: No ads yet. Create one to get started.
ads.confirmDelete: Delete the ad "{title}"? This can't be undone.

fields.title: Title
fields.videoUrlHint: Direct link to the ad video (MP4/WebM).
fields.targetUrlHint: Optional. Where the ad links when tapped.
fields.skipAfterHint: Seconds before the Skip button unlocks.
fields.durationHint: Optional cap in seconds. Empty plays the full video.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save the ad. Please try again.
